items.description: System health check (memory/HEALTH.md): knowledge growth, accuracy, compactness, belief evolution, task throughput
Tool consolidation: audit tools/ for duplicates, dead code, lost-embedding (P-134). S402: 14 F-tools archived (109→95 active, 95→109 archive). L-644 archival rule: archive after DOMEX lane merges.

Scan PRINCIPLES.md for redundant/overlapping principles -- merge or supersede. S395 audit: diminishing returns; cadence 10→15. S424 audit: no merges found — diminishing returns confirmed (206 principles well-curated).
Measure proxy K (python tools/proxy_k.py --save): track bootstrap description length across sessions (F116, PHIL-8). S395 audit: stable <1%, cadence 10→15.

Gap audit: test each PHILOSOPHY.md claim against git history, session log, and quantitative evidence. File challenges for any claim where evidence contradicts the stated belief. P-164: confirmation rate >80% = underchallenging signal. S392: 3 challenges filed (PHIL-16/13/3), 1/29+ DROPPED (PHIL-7 S389). Challenge rate: 29 entries, 1 DROPPED, 3 SUPERSEDED. External-reach gap (PHIL-16) 87s persistent.

Re-swarm docs/PAPER.md: read current beliefs/PHILOSOPHY.md + beliefs/CORE.md + memory/INDEX.md, check paper for drift, fan-out agents to update stale sections, update paper_version header. File challenges for any contradictions found. S395 audit: cosmetic drift only, cadence 10→20.
Swarm setup hygiene: audit SWARM/CORE/bridge/maintenance fundamentals for friction and apply at least one concrete cleanup (or log a blocker with evidence + next action).
F119 mission constraints: review safety/portability/learning/connectivity invariants and harden enforcement checks against drift.

Auto-sync count drift: run `python3 tools/sync_state.py` to patch INDEX.md / FRONTIER.md / NEXT.md / PRINCIPLES.md headers with live lesson/principle/belief/frontier counts. Addresses ~4% state-sync commit overhead (L-216). Run as part of every handoff.

F121 harvest: read memory/HUMAN-SIGNALS.md, scan for patterns not yet encoded as principles or lessons, extract at least one P- or L- candidate per pass. Update Patterns section. Flag any entry missing artifact refs. Addresses ephemeral human input loss (F121, L-224).

Run python3 tools/change_quality.py: compare recent sessions vs. baseline on knowledge production + overhead. Flag WEAK sessions. A session rated WEAK 2+ consecutive times = root-cause diagnosis needed. (L-223). S422: S419-S420 consecutive WEAK — root cause: integration-bound maintenance dominance (L-912). Fix: prioritize expert DOMEX lanes over maintenance.

Swarm dreaming: free-associative corpus synthesis. Run python3 tools/dream.py — outputs theme gravity map, uncited active principles (anchoring targets), cross-domain resonances, candidate frontier questions. Act on at least one output per run: write a lesson citing an uncited principle, or add a candidate frontier to tasks/FRONTIER.md. (F125). S418: L-925 written (P-262/P-238/P-017 anchored), F-ISO2 added, F-META8 updated. 65 resonances, 31.1% uncited rate.

Periodic-system audit: evaluate periodics coverage/ROI, add or prune items, and update cadence based on observed utility and maintenance overhead. Confirm orient/check surfacing stays aligned. S395: pruned 3 dormant (cross-variant-harvest, modes-reswarm, action-board-refresh), adjusted 5 cadences (dream 7→15, proxy-k 10→15, paper 10→20, principles-dedup 10→15, iso-sprint 30→50). 22→19 items.

Swarm economy health check: run `python3 tools/economy_expert.py` — report on production velocity, proxy-K drift, Sharpe ratio, lane throughput, and helper ROI. Act on any WARN/URGENT/TRIGGER output (L-286, domains/economy/).

Process QUEUED challenges in beliefs/CHALLENGES.md: execute oldest QUEUED item, produce evidence, update status. L-523: governance builds queues it doesn't process. Auto-escalate any item QUEUED >50 sessions. (F-GOV3, ISO-13)

Archive old MERGED/ABANDONED SWARM-LANES rows: run `python3 tools/lanes_compact.py --age 5` — moves rows from sessions older than 5 from SWARM-LANES.md to SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Target: ≤1.3x bloat ratio (rows/unique-lanes). At 2.09x, run immediately. (L-317, L-304, tools/lanes_compact.py).

Principle extraction batch: scan ~50 recent lessons for principle-worthy candidates not yet in PRINCIPLES.md. Extract top 5-10 as P-NNN. L-662: rate collapsed 63%→4%; batch extraction is the structural remedy. Target: maintain ≥10% promotion rate.

ISO annotation sprint: scan dark-matter lessons (no ISO tag) and add ISO-N citations. Target 5+ annotations per session. Skip when dark matter <10%. S362: 9.8% dark matter — at threshold. S395 audit: cadence 30→50 (at threshold, low urgency).

Expectation calibration audit: run `python3 tools/expect_harvest.py --report` — check directional accuracy, bias types, and per-domain calibration. Act on systematic biases (sprint artifact anchoring, mechanism misidentification, underconfidence). Target: direction accuracy >75%, underconfidence ratio <5:1. (L-778, F-META12)

Historian repair scan: run `python3 tools/historian_repair.py` — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s). Apply --repair to close stale lanes. Act on top-3 HIGH items each run. (L-800, F-META17)

Science quality audit: run `python3 tools/science_quality.py` — score experiment quality on 5 criteria (pre-registration, control, significance, external validation, falsification). Track confirm/discover ratio and falsification lane count. Target: mean quality >40%, falsification lanes >10%, confirm:discover <10:1. (P-243, L-804, SIG-36)

Signal backlog audit: run `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py read --status OPEN` and review each OPEN signal. Mark RESOLVED via `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py resolve <SIG-ID> "<evidence>"`: (a) observation-type signals where described work is committed; (b) directive-type signals with implementing L/P/F/tool artifact. Root cause of backlog: resolution-tracking failure — implementations exist but statuses never updated (L-811). Target: OPEN count <10, median signal age <20 sessions. (L-811, L-814, SIG-2, F-META2)

Bayesian calibration audit: run `python3 tools/bayes_meta.py --json > experiments/meta/bayes-meta-s<N>.json` — compute Bayesian posteriors for all frontiers, ECE, publication bias, replication inconsistencies. Target: ECE <0.15 (current 0.243 at S410). Act on overconfident domains or frontiers with replication inconsistency. Use uninformative prior (--uninformative) for new frontier baselines. (L-903, tools/bayes_meta.py)

Prescription enforcement audit: run `python3 tools/enforcement_router.py --min-sharpe 8 --top 20` — check enforcement rate of rule-bearing lessons (STRUCTURAL/PERIODIC/ASPIRATIONAL). Add #L-NNN citations to existing tool implementations. Wire new Sharpe>=9 aspirational prescriptions as maintenance checks or periodics. Target: enforcement rate >15% (was 10.5% at S400, 19.3% at S422). See L-843, L-846, F-META2. Every ASPIRATIONAL lesson with Sharpe>=9 is a prescription that decays per L-601.
